The '''Barnaba Embassy''' on [[Procopia/Legends|Procopia]], in the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]], was located on [[Estalle Island]]. It was an ostentatious building that had the largest ballroom of all the [[Tapani Noble Houses|House]] embassies on Procopia.

{{Struct-stub}}
